lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਸੇਵਿਆ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਆਪਣਾ ਸੋਈ ਰਾਜ ਨਰਿੰਦੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jin seviaa prabh aapanaa soee raaj narind |2|
lines.english: One who has served his God is the emperor of kings||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤਾ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮੁ ਬਖਸਿੰਦੁ ॥
lines.translit: santaa sangat man vasai prabh preetam bakhasind |
lines.english: In the Society of the Saints, God, the Beloved, the Forgiver, comes to dwell within the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਉਸਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਸੁ ਗੁਣ ਰਮਣ ਜਿਤੁ ਕੋਟਿ ਮਜਨ ਇਸਨਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: aausar har jas gun raman jit kott majan isanaan |
lines.english: This is the time to speak and sing the Praise and the Glory of God, which brings the merit of millions of cleansing and purifying baths.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਸਨਾ ਉਚਰੈ ਗੁਣਵਤੀ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਪੁਜੈ ਦਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: rasanaa ucharai gunavatee koe na pujai daan |
lines.english: The tongue which chants these Praises is worthy; there is no charity equal to this.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਉ ਪਿੰਡੁ ਧਨੁ ਤਿਸ ਦਾ ਹਉ ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਕੁਰਬਾਨੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jeeo pindd dhan tis daa hau sadaa sadaa kurabaan |3|
lines.english: My soul, body and wealth are His. Forever and ever, I am a sacrifice to Him. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਧਾਰਿ ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਦਇਆਲ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਮਿਹਰਵਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: drisatt dhaar man tan vasai deaal purakh miharavaan |
lines.english: Blessing us with His Glance of Grace, the Kind and Compassionate, All-powerful Lord comes to dwell within the mind and body.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲਿਆ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਵਿਛੁੜੈ ਜੋ ਮੇਲਿਆ ਕਰਤਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: miliaa kade na vichhurrai jo meliaa karataar |
lines.english: One whom the Creator Lord has met and joined to Himself shall never again be separated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਾਸਾ ਕੇ ਬੰਧਨ ਕਟਿਆ ਸਾਚੈ ਸਿਰਜਣਹਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: daasaa ke bandhan kattiaa saachai sirajanahaar |
lines.english: The True Creator Lord breaks the bonds of His slave.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਸੁ ਸਰਣਾਗਤੀ ਜਿ ਸਗਲ ਘਟਾ ਆਧਾਰੁ ॥੪॥੧੮॥੮੮॥
lines.translit: naanak tis saranaagatee ji sagal ghattaa aadhaar |4|18|88|
lines.english: Nanak seeks the Sanctuary of the One who is the Support of every heart. ||4||18||88||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੂਲਾ ਮਾਰਗਿ ਪਾਇਓਨੁ ਗੁਣ ਅਵਗੁਣ ਨ ਬੀਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: bhoolaa maarag paaeon gun avagun na beechaar |
lines.english: The doubter has been put back on the path; his merits and demerits have not been considered.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਸਨਾ ਸਚਾ ਸਿਮਰੀਐ ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: rasanaa sachaa simareeai man tan niramal hoe |
lines.english: With your tongue, repeat the True Name, and your mind and body shall become pure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਤ ਪਿਤਾ ਸਾਕ ਅਗਲੇ ਤਿਸੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: maat pitaa saak agale tis bin avar na koe |
lines.english: Your mother and father and all your relations-without Him, there are none at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਹਰ ਕਰੇ ਜੇ ਆਪਣੀ ਚਸਾ ਨ ਵਿਸਰੈ ਸੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: mihar kare je aapanee chasaa na visarai soe |1|
lines.english: If God Himself bestows His Mercy, then He is not forgotten, even for an instant. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਚੇ ਸਭ ਕੂੜੁ ਹੈ ਅੰਤੇ ਹੋਇ ਬਿਨਾਸੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bin sache sabh koorr hai ante hoe binaas |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Without the True One, everything is false; in the end, all shall perish. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਸਾਚਾ ਸੇਵਿ ਜਿਚਰੁ ਸਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: man mere saachaa sev jichar saas |
lines.english: O my mind, serve the True One, as long as you have the breath of life.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਮੇਰਾ ਨਿਰਮਲਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਰਹਣੁ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: saahib meraa niramalaa tis bin rehan na jaae |
lines.english: My Lord and Master is Immaculate and Pure; without Him, I cannot even survive.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੈ ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਭੁਖ ਅਤਿ ਅਗਲੀ ਕੋਈ ਆਣਿ ਮਿਲਾਵੈ ਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: merai man tan bhukh at agalee koee aan milaavai maae |
lines.english: Within my mind and body, there is such a great hunger; if only someone would come and unite me with Him, O my mother!

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਾਰੇ ਕੁੰਡਾ ਭਾਲੀਆ ਸਹ ਬਿਨੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: chaare kunddaa bhaaleea seh bin avar na jaae |2|
lines.english: I have searched the four corners of the world-without our Husband Lord, there is no other place of rest. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਆਗੈ ਅਰਦਾਸਿ ਕਰਿ ਜੋ ਮੇਲੇ ਕਰਤਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: tis aagai aradaas kar jo mele karataar |
lines.english: Offer your prayers to Him, who shall unite you with the Creator.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਦਾਤਾ ਨਾਮ ਕਾ ਪੂਰਾ ਜਿਸੁ ਭੰਡਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: satigur daataa naam kaa pooraa jis bhanddaar |
lines.english: The True Guru is the Giver of the Naam; His Treasure is perfect and overflowing.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰਵਦਗਾਰੁ ਸਾਲਾਹੀਐ ਜਿਸ ਦੇ ਚਲਤ ਅਨੇਕ ॥
lines.translit: paravadagaar saalaaheeai jis de chalat anek |
lines.english: Praise God, the Nurturer and Cherisher; His Wondrous Ways are unlimited.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਸਾਲਾਹੀਐ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਰਾਵਾਰੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sadaa sadaa saalaaheeai ant na paaraavaar |3|
lines.english: Forever and ever, praise the One, who has no end or limitation. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਆਰਾਧੀਐ ਏਹਾ ਮਤਿ ਵਿਸੇਖ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa sadaa aaraadheeai ehaa mat visekh |
lines.english: Forever and ever, worship and adore Him; this is the most wonderful wisdom.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਮਿਠਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਲਗੈ ਜਿਸੁ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਲੇਖ ॥੪॥੧੯॥੮੯॥
lines.translit: man tan mitthaa tis lagai jis masatak naanak lekh |4|19|89|
lines.english: O Nanak, God's Flavor is sweet to the minds and bodies of those who have such blessed destiny written on their foreheads. ||4||19||89||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਜਨਹੁ ਮਿਲਿ ਭਾਈਹੋ ਸਚਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਮਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: sant janahu mil bhaaeeho sachaa naam samaal |
lines.english: Meet with the humble Saints, O Siblings of Destiny, and contemplate the True Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੋਸਾ ਬੰਧਹੁ ਜੀਅ ਕਾ ਐਥੈ ਓਥੈ ਨਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: tosaa bandhahu jeea kaa aithai othai naal |
lines.english: For the journey of the soul, gather those supplies which will go with you here and hereafter.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪੂਰੇ ਤੇ ਪਾਈਐ ਅਪਣੀ ਨਦਰਿ ਨਿਹਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: gur poore te paaeeai apanee nadar nihaal |
lines.english: These are obtained from the Perfect Guru, when God bestows His Glance of Grace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਮਿ ਪਰਾਪਤਿ ਤਿਸੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਹੋਇ ਦਇਆਲੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: karam paraapat tis hovai jis no hoe deaal |1|
lines.english: Those unto whom He is Merciful, receive His Grace. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਜਾ ਥਾਉ ਨ ਕੋ ਸੁਝੈ ਗੁਰ ਮੇਲੇ ਸਚੁ ਸੋਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: doojaa thaau na ko sujhai gur mele sach soe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I cannot imagine any other place. The Guru leads me to meet the True Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਗੁਰ ਜੇਵਡੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: mere man gur jevadd avar na koe |
lines.english: O my mind, there is no other as great as the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਚਰਣੀ ਜਿਨ ਮਨੁ ਲਗਾ ਸੇ ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur charanee jin man lagaa se vaddabhaagee maae |
lines.english: Those whose minds are attached to the Guru's Feet are very fortunate, O my mother.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲ ਪਦਾਰਥ ਤਿਸੁ ਮਿਲੇ ਜਿਨਿ ਗੁਰੁ ਡਿਠਾ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sagal padaarath tis mile jin gur dditthaa jaae |
lines.english: Those who go to see the Guru obtain all treasures.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਦਾਤਾ ਸਮਰਥੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਸਭ ਮਹਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur daataa samarath gur gur sabh meh rahiaa samaae |
lines.english: The Guru is the Giver, the Guru is All-powerful. The Guru is All-pervading, contained amongst all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਪਰਮੇਸਰੁ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਡੁਬਦਾ ਲਏ ਤਰਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: gur paramesar paarabraham gur ddubadaa le taraae |2|
lines.english: The Guru is the Transcendent Lord, the Supreme Lord God. The Guru lifts up and saves those who are drowning. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਮਥੇ ਨਿਹਚਲ ਰਹੇ ਜਿਨ ਗੁਰਿ ਧਾਰਿਆ ਹਥੁ ॥
lines.translit: se mathe nihachal rahe jin gur dhaariaa hath |
lines.english: Those, upon whose foreheads the Guru has placed His Hand, remain steady and stable.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਤੁ ਮੁਖਿ ਗੁਰੁ ਸਾਲਾਹੀਐ ਕਰਣ ਕਾਰਣ ਸਮਰਥੁ ॥
lines.translit: kit mukh gur saalaaheeai karan kaaran samarath |
lines.english: How shall I praise the Guru, the All-powerful Cause of causes?

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਪਰਮੇਸਰੁ ਸੇਵਿਆ ਭੈ ਭੰਜਨੁ ਦੁਖ ਲਥੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: gur paramesar seviaa bhai bhanjan dukh lath |3|
lines.english: I serve the Guru, the Transcendent Lord, the Dispeller of fear; my suffering has been taken away. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਨਾਮੁ ਪੀਆਲਿਆ ਜਨਮ ਮਰਨ ਕਾ ਪਥੁ ॥
lines.translit: gur amrit naam peeaaliaa janam maran kaa path |
lines.english: The Guru has led me to drink in the Ambrosial Nectar of the Naam, the Name of the Lord; He has released me from the cycle of birth and death.
